originalTitle: Caf general secretary resigns amid Afcon final fallout
title: Caf general secretary resigns amid Afcon final fallout
content: Veron Mosengo-Omba, a controversial figure, leaves at a turbulent time for African football.

originalTitle: One ant for $220: The new frontier of wildlife trafficking
title: One ant for $220: The new frontier of wildlife trafficking
content: The craze for collecting ants takes Kenya by surprise as smugglers zone in to make a profit.

originalTitle: Senegal parade Afcon trophy despite title controversy
title: Senegal parade Afcon trophy despite title controversy
content: Senegal parade the Africa Cup of Nations trophy before Saturday's friendly match against Peru in Paris - despite being stripped of the title earlier this month.

content: The Yemeni group has launched missiles towards Israel in support of Iran.

title: Iran accuses US of plotting ground attack, as Israel steps up bombardment
content: Power being restored after Iran's Ministry of Energy reported outages in the capital, Tehran following attacks.

originalTitle: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
content: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.

content: A number of people are said to have been injured after attacks on aluminium sites in the UAE and Bahrain.

title: Spurs have addressed their Tudor error - but cannot afford another
content: Chief executive Vinai Venkatesham and sporting director Johan Lange must get the next Tottenham appointment correct or else they could follow Igor Tudor, writes Phil McNulty.

originalTitle: 75% of fans oppose VAR in Premier League, says FSA
title: 75% of fans oppose VAR in Premier League, says FSA
content: Fans believe VAR is ruining goal celebrations and has not improved football since its introduction, according to a Football Supporters' Association survey.
